overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic city during a heavy rainstorm at night. The vehicle travels from elevated highways through covered tunnels and into dense neon-lit downtown streets with dynamic traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with metal guardrails and palm trees

events.description: vehicle accelerates while navigating curved highway ramp

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway, navigating gentle curves through heavy rain with wipers active

metal guardrail with yellow top edge along right side of roadway
tall palm trees lining the highway, visible through rain haze
futuristic street light poles with blue illumination
futuristic skyscrapers with neon lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a heavy downpour, with metal guardrails lining both sides and palm trees visible through the rain. The vehicle navigates gentle curves while approaching the city center, with futuristic skyscrapers glowing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with neon signage and traffic control

events.description: exiting elevated highway onto main urban arterial road
navigating intersection with yellow crosswalk markings and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: slowing down for intersection, turning right onto main city street while avoiding other vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue sports car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated 'DYNALUX' sign on building facade, white neon letters
yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk markings
futuristic traffic signal posts with blue and red lights
colorful neon lights reflecting off wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from highway to urban streets, approaching a large intersection with the prominent 'DYNALUX' building sign visible. The vehicle navigates through crosswalks while neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked pavement, and other vehicles wait at the traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel roadway with artificial ceiling lighting

events.description: entering covered tunnel section, switching to artificial ceiling lights
approaching tunnel exit, natural and neon light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through covered roadway with consistent artificial lighting, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the tunnel, brake lights visible

smooth concrete wall with horizontal lines on left side of tunnel
smooth concrete wall with emergency lighting on right side
linear fluorescent lights running along tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered tunnel section with artificial lighting replacing the dark rainy sky. The concrete walls and ceiling create an enclosed environment, while the vehicle follows a red sedan toward the tunnel exit where city lights become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown street with neon billboards and pedestrian activity

events.description: exiting tunnel into dense urban downtown with bright neon signage and advertisements
approaching pedestrian crosswalk with people holding umbrellas on sidewalks

agents.ego_description: navigating busy city streets with frequent crosswalks, neon-lit buildings, and moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: person with red umbrella walking along the sidewalk
red sports car driving ahead, stopping at crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated 'DYNALUX' signage on upper floors
large digital advertising screens with cyan and pink neon graphics
yellow striped crosswalk markings with pedestrians waiting
tall skyscrapers with reflective glass facades and neon accents
palm trees lining the downtown street, wet from rain

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into the vibrant downtown core, surrounded by towering glass buildings and massive neon billboards. The street is lined with palm trees and pedestrians with umbrellas, while the vehicle navigates through multiple crosswalks and moderate traffic in the rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a rainy elevated highway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins by navigating gentle curves along a highway lined with metal guardrails and palm trees, with glowing skyscrapers emerging through a heavy downpour. As the vehicle descends into the urban grid, the scene shifts toward a large intersection where neon lights and the prominent Dynalux sign reflect off the rain-slicked pavement. The environment then closes in as the camera enters a covered tunnel with artificial lighting and concrete walls, following a red sedan toward a distant glow. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the tunnel into the vibrant downtown core, surrounded by towering glass buildings, massive billboards, and pedestrians with umbrellas under the persistent rain.
